heading: OneStream Live
summary: Live streaming studio and marketing surfaces for creators worldwide.
highlights: Live streaming studio and marketing surfaces used by creators worldwide
Responsive layouts and performance-conscious UI for long session use
description: Engage with the power of OneStream Live, a cloud-based live streaming platform that seamlessly crafts professional live streams and enables multistreaming to over 45 social media platforms and the web concurrently. The website, studio, and mobile app collectively showcase a user-centric experience, combining intuitive design with seamless backend integration.

heading: Dynamic Drag and drop
summary: Library-free drag-and-drop with precise layout math and responsive presets.
highlights: Library-free drag-and-drop with precise coordinate math
Responsive switching between layout presets on web and mobile
description: Experience a library-free project for streaming platforms with diverse layouts. Utilizing precise math, this project allows intuitive drag-and-drop functionality for easy element rearrangement.

heading: WorkerX
summary: Scheduling product: appointments, staff and customer flows, and bookings dashboards.
highlights: Appointment-focused flows for staff and customers
Dashboard patterns for availability and bookings
description: Elevate your scheduling efficiency and customer service excellence with WorkerX. This innovative project empowers you to boost appointment numbers while ensuring a top-notch customer experience.

heading: HSTC engineering
summary: Defense and security marketing with a clear hierarchy for technical audiences.
highlights: Defense and security–oriented marketing and product presentation
Clear information hierarchy for technical audiences
description: A Vanguard in Defense and Security Solutions. Specialized in Military, Defense, and Security domains, we seamlessly integrate cutting-edge technology into our services and products.

heading: BuildX
summary: Construction software for schedules, leads, and cash-flow visibility.
highlights: Schedules, leads, and financial tooling in one product narrative
Flows for project tracking and cash-flow visibility
description: Revolutionizing construction management. Streamline schedules, connect with your team effortlessly, and bid farewell to traditional tools. This construction software empowers your business with seamless project planning and tracking.
